projects.name: ECHO Full Stack
projects.description: Full ECHO workspace release stack across shared core services, Ashfall, Terminal, SignalOS, beta/dev modules, public release modules, MultiblockCore, RuntimeGuard, Blockworks, HoloMap, Index, Armory, and Lens.

projects.name: ECHO: Core
projects.description: Shared ECHO services, data contracts, runtime hooks, and cross-addon infrastructure.

projects.name: ECHO: NetCore
projects.nextRecommendedAction: Run scoped scan for ECHO: NetCore
projects.description: Shared packet, sync, server action, rate limiting, and debug network layer for ECHO addons.

projects.name: ECHO: DataCore
projects.nextRecommendedAction: Run scoped scan for ECHO: DataCore
projects.description: Shared persistent data and progression layer for ECHO services and addon state.

projects.name: ECHO: MissionCore
projects.nextRecommendedAction: Run scoped scan for ECHO: MissionCore
projects.description: Shared mission, objective, reward, and Terminal feed backend for ECHO addon chapters.

projects.name: ECHO: MultiblockCore
projects.nextRecommendedAction: Run scoped scan for ECHO: MultiblockCore
projects.description: Shared data-driven multiblock service layer for facility structures, controller orchestration, diagnostics, runtime snapshots, robotic task queues, workcells, integrity, blueprints, and optional Terminal/Lens/HoloMap/DataCore integrations.

projects.name: ECHO: RuntimeGuard
projects.nextRecommendedAction: Run scoped scan for ECHO: RuntimeGuard
projects.description: Shared performance manager for TPS/MSPT, client FPS, runtime modes, smart tick budgeting, particle budgets, multiblock validation queues, network budgets, profiling reports, and optional ECHO addon throttling.

projects.name: ECHO: Ashfall Protocol
projects.description: Root survival campaign module with resources, gameplay data, POIs, factions, and the first ECHO progression route.

projects.name: ECHO: Terminal
projects.description: Terminal UI, mission surfaces, reward inbox, route records, and addon tab integration.

projects.name: SignalOS
projects.description: SignalOS terminal framework and shared UI primitives for ECHO-style command surfaces.

projects.name: SignalOS Example Addon
projects.description: Example addon that exercises SignalOS integration patterns and test wiring.

projects.name: ECHO: Orbital Remnants
projects.description: Orbital route content, launch chain, telemetry, caches, and suit support.

projects.name: ECHO: Nexus Protocol
projects.description: Nexus unlocks, anomaly storms, route gates, and Blackbox bridge support.

projects.name: ECHO: Agriculture Reclamation
projects.description: Agriculture reclamation content for survival loops and recovery infrastructure.

projects.name: ECHO: WorldCore
projects.nextRecommendedAction: Run scoped scan for ECHO: WorldCore
projects.description: Shared world vocabulary and runtime services for regions, hazards, markers, discoveries, HoloMap feeds, and RenderCore profiles.

projects.name: ECHO: Stationfall
projects.description: Station pressure route, crew logs, AI override chain, hostile station entities, and terminal support.

projects.name: ECHO: Blackbox Protocol
projects.description: Memory fragments, dungeon gates, archive terminal hooks, and late-route endings.

projects.name: ECHO: Industrial Nexus
projects.description: Machine routes, compat hooks, recipe coverage, and station/blackbox industrial support.

projects.name: ECHO: Logistics Network
projects.description: Logistics network module for route infrastructure, delivery loops, and connected storage support.

projects.name: ECHO: RenderCore
projects.nextRecommendedAction: Run scoped scan for ECHO: RenderCore
projects.description: Shared rendering, animation, glow, overlay, particle profile, validation, and debug tools for ECHO visual states.

projects.name: ECHO: Convoy Protocol
projects.description: Convoy route content, mobile operations, and support systems for late-pack traversal.

projects.name: ECHO: HoloMap
projects.nextRecommendedAction: Run scoped scan for ECHO: HoloMap
projects.description: Terminal command-map tab for crash sites, routes, hazards, missions, bases, orbital overlays, anomalies, and drone scan markers.

projects.name: ECHO: Index
projects.nextRecommendedAction: Run scoped scan for ECHO: Index
projects.description: Shared item, recipe, usage, archive, bookmark, and Terminal index browser for ECHO modules.

projects.name: ECHO: Armory
projects.nextRecommendedAction: Run scoped scan for ECHO: Armory
projects.description: Modular weapons, armor, augments, energy cores, mission loadouts, faction gear, and Terminal-managed combat readiness.

projects.name: ECHO: Lens
projects.nextRecommendedAction: Run scoped scan for ECHO: Lens
projects.description: Modern ECHO scanner HUD for blocks, entities, fluids, machines, progression, and addon integrations.

projects.name: ECHO: Blockworks
projects.nextRecommendedAction: Run scoped scan for ECHO: Blockworks
projects.description: First-party decorative and structural block library for ECHO bases, ruined cities, crash zones, convoy depots, orbital interiors, Terminal rooms, Blackbox vaults, Nexus structures, reclamation domes, and MultiblockCore casings.

projects.name: ARCANA: Veilbound Studies
projects.description: Standalone NeoForge magic research mod about Veil resonance, rituals, constructs, fracture risk, and late-game Veil choices.

roadmapPhases.title: Core + Terminal Stability
roadmapPhases.summary: Shared services, terminal shell, mission browser, reward inbox, diagnostics.

roadmapPhases.title: Ashfall Campaign Polish
roadmapPhases.summary: First-hour survival, Nexus path, POIs, scanner, factions, finale readiness.

roadmapPhases.title: POI + Scanner Pass
roadmapPhases.summary: Route Map, POI Atlas, generated structures, scanner route records.

roadmapPhases.title: Faction Pass
roadmapPhases.summary: Faction contracts, side ops, field archive, lore cohesion.

roadmapPhases.title: Drone Pass
roadmapPhases.summary: Companion Link, command states, terminal feedback, reward hooks.

roadmapPhases.title: Orbital Remnants QA
roadmapPhases.summary: Launch chain, route telemetry, suit support, boss and cache checks.

roadmapPhases.title: Stationfall QA
roadmapPhases.summary: Station pressure route, AI override, crew logs, terminal surface.

roadmapPhases.title: Nexus Protocol QA
roadmapPhases.summary: Nexus unlocks, anomaly storms, Blackbox monolith bridge.

roadmapPhases.title: Industrial Nexus QA
roadmapPhases.summary: Machine routes, compat hooks, recipe coverage, station/blackbox support.

roadmapPhases.title: Blackbox Protocol QA
roadmapPhases.summary: Memory fragments, dungeon route gates, endings, archive terminal.

roadmapPhases.title: Release Candidate
roadmapPhases.summary: Full stack build, validators, GameTests, jar set, runtime log scan.

roadmapPhases.title: Field Journal + Research Loop
roadmapPhases.summary: Research categories, journal progression, Veil readings, and unlock feedback for the first playable study loop.

roadmapPhases.title: Ritual + Convergence Systems
roadmapPhases.summary: Ritual validation, convergence rewards, Resonance Lens flow, and late-game Veilbound choices.

roadmapPhases.title: Fracture + Construct QA
roadmapPhases.summary: Fracture risk events, construct behaviors, entity resources, and related GameTest coverage.

roadmapPhases.title: Release Verification
roadmapPhases.summary: Gradle build, resource validator, runtime log scan, GameTests, and verifyArcanaRelease gate.

promptTemplates.title: Terminal QA
promptTemplates.description: Verify every registered terminal chapter tab loads cleanly.
promptTemplates.body: Scan the full ECHO Terminal source and verify that every registered chapter tab loads without missing icons, missing translation keys, or broken click actions. Check Command Deck, What Now, Mission Graph, Protocol Roadmap, Signal Leads, Route Map, POI Atlas, Route Records, Survival Index, Faction Atlas, Vitals, Companion Link, Reward Inbox, Nexus Core, Orbital, Stationfall, Nexus Protocol, Industrial Nexus, and Blackbox Protocol. Fix issues and summarize changed files.

promptTemplates.title: Addon Handoff QA
promptTemplates.description: Audit the release addon milestone handoff chain.
promptTemplates.body: Audit the milestone handoff chain: Ashfall to Orbital Remnants, Orbital Remnants to Stationfall, Stationfall to Nexus Protocol, Nexus Protocol to Blackbox Protocol, and Industrial Nexus support hooks. Verify that each handoff is gated correctly, cannot trigger too early, has terminal feedback, and persists correctly.

promptTemplates.title: Release Readiness Sweep
promptTemplates.description: Summarize the final release gate and blockers.
promptTemplates.body: Run a release-readiness audit for ECHO. Inspect the Gradle release tasks, validator coverage, selected addon-set behavior, current module versions, jar copy assumptions, and docs. Do not run destructive commands. Report blockers, risky assumptions, and the next safest verification order.

promptTemplates.title: Blackbox Memory Fragment
promptTemplates.body: Create a 16x16 Minecraft pixel-art item texture for an ECHO Blackbox Memory Fragment. It should look like a cracked black data shard with faint cyan signal lines, dark sci-fi survival style, readable silhouette, no text, transparent background.

promptTemplates.title: Terminal Icon Kit
promptTemplates.description: Terminal and mission icon texture prompt.
promptTemplates.body: Create a cohesive set of 16x16 Minecraft-style terminal icons for ECHO: Command Deck, Mission Graph, Route Map, POI Atlas, Vitals, Companion Link, Reward Inbox, Nexus Core, Orbital, Stationfall, Industrial Nexus, and Blackbox Protocol. Use crisp silhouettes, cyan/amber/green accents, transparent backgrounds, and readable tactical sci-fi shapes.

promptTemplates.title: Release Trailer Thumbnail
promptTemplates.body: Create a cinematic trailer thumbnail for ECHO: Ashfall Protocol and its addon chain. Show a lone survivor facing a glowing Nexus Core under ruined orbital debris, with subtle terminal UI overlays and high-contrast survival sci-fi lighting. No text.

promptTemplates.title: ARCANA Readiness Sweep
promptTemplates.description: Audit ARCANA build, scan, and release blockers.
promptTemplates.body: Run a release-readiness audit for ARCANA: Veilbound Studies. Inspect Gradle tasks, validateArcanaResources, runtime log checks, GameTest coverage, current mod version, jar promotion assumptions, and docs. Do not run destructive commands. Report blockers, risky assumptions, and the next safest verification order.

promptTemplates.title: Veil Icon Kit
promptTemplates.description: ARCANA item and UI texture prompt.
promptTemplates.body: Create a cohesive set of 16x16 Minecraft-style ARCANA: Veilbound Studies icons for Veil resonance, research notes, ritual focus, fracture warning, construct core, convergence reward, and Resonance Lens. Use crisp silhouettes, violet/teal/gold accents, transparent backgrounds, and readable magical research shapes.

releaseActions.label: Build Beta Stack
releaseActions.description: Build the selected beta ECHO addon set from the workspace root.

releaseActions.label: Build Full Stack
releaseActions.description: Build Core, Ashfall, Terminal, and all release addon chapters.

releaseActions.label: Verify Release
releaseActions.description: Run validators, workspace build, jar-set check, runtime log scan, and full-stack GameTests.

releaseActions.label: Run GameTests
releaseActions.description: Run explicit full-stack GameTest server tasks.

releaseActions.label: Scan Runtime Logs
releaseActions.description: Check recent run logs and crash reports for fresh startup crash signatures.

releaseActions.label: Check Jar Set
releaseActions.description: Verify the configured modpack folder has exactly one current jar per selected ECHO module.

releaseActions.label: Copy Jars to Modpack
releaseActions.description: Copy the selected full-stack jars into the configured modpack mods folder.

releaseActions.label: Remove Stale Jars
releaseActions.description: Move stale ECHO jars into the local quarantine folder instead of deleting them.

releaseActions.label: Generate Release Notes
releaseActions.description: Generate local Markdown release notes from current roadmap, modules, QA tracks, and release actions.
